Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Implement 7 major improvements and PWA setup

This commit includes:

**Improvements:**
1. Filter-aware error messaging - Users now see specific filters that caused no results
2. Smart caching & deduplication - Prevents duplicate organization listings with fuzzy matching
3. Search validation & debouncing - 300ms debounce on filter changes, auto-search with existing results
4. Result quality metrics - Completeness score \(0-100\) based on available fields, verified badges for trusted organizations
5. Filter edge case fixes - Adult filter now correctly excludes youth-only groups
6. Accessibility improvements - Enhanced ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management in modals
7. Offline support & error resilience - Online/offline detection, network error handling, cache fallback strategy

**PWA Setup:**
- Installed vite-plugin-pwa for service worker and caching
- Generated responsive app icons \(192x192, 512x512\) with teal community design
- Configured workbox caching strategies \(Network-First for APIs with 12-24h expiration\)
- Added PWA meta tags and manifest for iOS/Android/Web installation
- Service worker auto-update detection on app focus and visibility change
- Comprehensive PWA documentation \(5 guides\)

**Files Modified:**
- App.tsx: Filter debouncing, auto-search, online/offline detection, enhanced error handling, results metrics
- services/geminiService.ts: Completeness scoring, fuzzy deduplication, filter-aware error messages, adult filter logic fix
- components/GroupCard.tsx: Quality metrics display, verified badges
- components/GroupDetailModal.tsx: Enhanced ARIA labels
- index.html: PWA meta tags and apple-mobile-web-app configuration
- vite.config.ts: VitePWA plugin with complete configuration
- types.ts: Added completenessScore field to SupportGroup interface
- package.json: Added vite-plugin-pwa dependency

**Files Created:**
- generate-icons.js: PWA icon generation script
- public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA manifest configuration
- public/icons/icon-192x192.png and icon-512x512.png: Generated app icons
- PWA_DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md: Complete deployment guide for all platforms
- PWA_SETUP_CHECKLIST.md: Pre/post deployment verification checklist
- QUICK_START.md: 5-minute deployment reference
- PWA_SUMMARY.md: Executive summary of PWA setup
- PWA_FEATURES.md: Detailed feature reference and scenarios

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
